§6Radio Frequency (RF) Cavities§f

§aBeam-acceleration component for the accelerator multiblock.§f

The §bAccelerator RF Cavity§f (qmd:accelerator_cavity) is a part block used inside the QMD accelerator multiblock structure. It contributes to the particle beam acceleration.

§6Recipe Ingredients§f:
§b•§f Item is not in jei-graph (no recipe edges found) — likely a §bCraftTweaker-added§f or §bJEI-invisible§f item
§b•§f Common accelerator-part recipes in QMD use: §bAccelerator Casing§f, §bSteel Chassis§f, §bTough Alloy Ingot§f, §bRedstone§f, §bCopper Coil§f

§6Source Code Reference§f:
§b•§f Tile class: lach_01298.qmd.accelerator.tile.TileAcceleratorRFCavity
§b•§f Validated as a valid accelerator component in AcceleratorLogic.isAcceleratorCasing() checks

§6Usage Context§f:
§b•§f Placed inside the accelerator multiblock structure
§b•§f Beam energy scales with the number of RF cavities and the redstone signal strength on the controller

§cNote§f: Recipe not present in jei-graph; check QMD recipe scripts in §bNu Research/scriptaddons/§f or §bWork/scripts/§f for the exact crafting recipe in this modpack.

§eWiki§f: https://github.com/Lach01298/QMD/wiki
